rulings.Case Title: WILLMETT VS A.P. GREEN INDUSTRIES INC.*

rulings.Rulings: CONTINUED TO 1-7-03. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO LODGE SUPPORTING EVIDENCE. COUNSEL'S DECLARATION (ORIGINAL & COURTESY COPY) IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT REFERS TO VARIOUS EXHIBITS BUT THOSE EXHIBITS ARE NOT ATTACHED. PLEASE LODGE EVIDENCE WITH A LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. (302/JJM/PB)
